creator: danp@danp.net
text:
This patch does the trick for me:

Index: bsd.port.mk
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk,v
retrieving revision 1.395
diff -u -r1.395 bsd.port.mk
--- bsd.port.mk	2001/12/22 17:13:38	1.395
+++ bsd.port.mk	2001/12/29 05:55:08
@@ -2069,7 +2069,6 @@
 .endif
 .if make(real-extract)
 	@cd ${.CURDIR} && ${MAKE} ${__softMAKEFLAGS} checksum REAL_EXTRACT=yes
-	@cd ${.CURDIR} && ${MAKE} ${__softMAKEFLAGS} build-depends lib-depends misc-depends
 .endif
 .if make(real-install)
 	@cd ${.CURDIR} && ${MAKE} ${__softMAKEFLAGS} check-categories
@@ -2118,6 +2117,9 @@
 .endif
 .if make(real-configure) && defined(USE_LIBTOOL)
 	@cd ${.CURDIR} && ${MAKE} ${__softMAKEFLAGS} patch-libtool
+.endif
+.if make(real-configure)
+	@cd ${.CURDIR} && ${MAKE} ${__softMAKEFLAGS} build-depends lib-depends misc-depends
 .endif
 	@cd ${.CURDIR} && ${MAKE} ${__softMAKEFLAGS} ${.TARGET:S/^real-/pre-/}
 	@if [ -f ${SCRIPTDIR}/${.TARGET:S/^real-/pre-/} ]; then \


In action:

/usr/ports/mail/cyrus# make extract
>> cyrus-imapd-1.6.24.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
>> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.andrew.cmu.edu/pub/cyrus-mail/.
Receiving cyrus-imapd-1.6.24.tar.gz (1046770 bytes): 100%
1046770 bytes transferred in 8.2 seconds (124.72 kBps)
===>  Extracting for cyrus-1.6.24_2
>> Checksum OK for cyrus-imapd-1.6.24.tar.gz.
/usr/ports/mail/cyrus#

A complete build and install ("make" followed by "make install") works
properly.

-- 
Dan Peterson <danp@danp.net> http://danp.net
